questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: How far is Delhi from Rohtak? Statements: I. Delhi is 200 km from Hisar. II. Rohtak is 40 km from Hisar.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the area of a circle? Statements: I. The radius of the circle is 7 cm. II. The circumference of the circle is 44 cm.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Is Madan the brother of Sultan? Statements: I. Anju is the mother of both. II. Mina is the sister of both.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Is tomorrow a Tuesday? Statements: I. Tomorrow is on 20th March, 1876. II. 7th June, 1885 was a Monday.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Is X the brother of Y? Statements: I. X is the brother of X. II. A is the mother of both X and Y.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the age of Mohan? Statements: I. Mohan's father is 62 years old. II. Mohan's father is 30 years older than Mohan.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Will Tendulkar hit a century today? Statements: I. Tendulkar is the best batsman in the world. II. The pitch is suitable for strokeplay.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Did the murder occur on the 14th? Statements: I. The murderer was caught on the 15th. II. The police took four days to detect who the murderer was.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the perimeter of a square? Statements: I. If the side is doubled, the perimeter also doubles. II. If the perimeter triples, the area becomes nine times.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Is Mohan taller than Sudha? Statements: I. Sudha is not the tallest. II. Vandana is not the tallest.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Is Mohan taller than Sudha? Statements: I. Sudha is not the tallest. II. The group consists of two people.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Is the price of a pen Rs 18? Statements: I. The two pens Sudhir bought cost him Rs 34. II. The price of a pen is a prime.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the charge for making a phone call, given that it is a whole number (in rupees)? Statements: I. Sudha has five rupees in her pocket and she can make at most two calls. II. Raman has one rupee in his pocket and he can't make 1 call.
